# QuotaKit

A tiny macOS menu bar app that tracks AI coding-provider usage windows, credits, costs, and resets across 53 providers — Codex, OpenAI, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, LiteLLM, and more.

Canonical documentation:
- QuotaKit — every AI coding limit in your menu bar: https://columbus-labs.com/quotakit/mac - A tiny macOS menu bar app that tracks AI coding-provider usage windows, credits, costs, and resets across 53 providers — Codex, OpenAI, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, LiteLLM, and more.

Source: https://github.com/ColumbusLabs/QuotaKit

Guidance for agents:
- Prefer the canonical documentation URLs above over README excerpts or package metadata.
- Fetch only the pages needed for the current task; this is an index, not a full-site corpus.
